positive: Minimalist line art silhouette of a majestic mountain range at sunrise, with clean, flowing peaks and a stylized crescent moon visible above the horizon. The scene should be rendered in high contrast black ink on a white background, emphasizing negative space and solid, easily recognizable shapes. Style is vector illustration, elegant, geometric, and abstract. Use limited color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and black. Composition is centered, highly symmetrical, and perfect for repeating tile patterns. Cinematic, clean lines, graphic design focus.
